response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: No vocal lyrics exist in this video, which features only instrumental music. 2. JSON Usage: Applied the visual text exception rule to subtitle the highly prominent on-screen announcement and merchandise cards. Scattered background fan messages were excluded to avoid clutter. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed to start and end exactly when the corresponding announcement or merchandise slide transitions on and off screen.
